use_cases: Interactive button with sliding text reveal and arrow on hover for enhanced CTAs.
Navigation trigger that transforms on hover to indicate clickability.
Call-to-action element for dark-themed interfaces requiring subtle animations.
Feature button in marketing pages and landing sections.
Action trigger in toolbars and control panels with hover feedback.
ai_summary: A dark-themed hover button featuring a sliding text animation where the label slides out while an arrow slides in. The component includes a color-morphing effect with a fuchsia circle that expands from the center on hover. Built with Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons, designed for interactive CTAs in dark-themed interfaces.
